/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -flto=auto  -o glabels_ext.cpython-313-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/glabels_ext.dir/glabels_ext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glabels_ext.dir/bind_types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glabels_ext.dir/bind_template.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glabels_ext.dir/bind_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glabels_ext.dir/bind_io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glabels_ext.dir/bind_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glabels_ext.dir/bind_merge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glabels_ext.dir/bind_barcode.cpp.o  ../model/libModel.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6PrintSupport.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Xml.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Svg.so.6 ../backends/barcode/libBarcode.a ../glbarcode/libglbarcode.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbarcode.so ../backends/merge/libMerge.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
